response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Redo' as the opening performance via on-screen text. 2. Identified the conversation segment. 3. Identified 'Happy Birthday to You' as the birthday celebration song. 4. Researched lyrics for both songs using the specified guidelines. 5. Constructed the JSON response mapping scenes to the identified music and timestamps.
response.global_summary: The video features a live musical performance by VTuber AZKi and singer Konomi Suzuki. It includes a performance of the song 'Redo', followed by conversation between the two performers, and concludes with a celebration of a birthday, featuring the song 'Happy Birthday to You'.

scenes.description: The video begins with a musical performance of 'Redo' by AZKi and Konomi Suzuki on a stage with heart-shaped lighting. The song title 'Redo' is visible in the top-left.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'm caught in my own past and lost
If I tell myself that's not it, can I control everything?
I don't know, the sky is hazy, where is the answer?
The precious things left in my palm are
Unforgettable memories, no matter how many times
I shout that I will protect you through to the end
The love I grasped within the rewind, that's right
I won't let it go
Scattered thoughts, to a wish that can only be made once
I entrusted it to my future self
One day's promise will become a light's guide
This oath, for your sake, until the very end
Even tears will surely turn into strength
I will connect to the future I was drawing
I'll connect it
Going crazy with situations beyond imagination
Digging my claws in, struggling, my heart is
How many times have I repeated the mistakes of life
And ended up hating them
Even if I'm crying
Your aspirations were always shining
I'll come back (yeah)
I'll come back (yeah)
To your future (go away)
I will resist fate
Breaking out (yeah)
Breaking out (yeah)
Breaking dawn (yeah go away)
Because I haven't given up
The bound will is towards a strength that is not alone
Tracing the spun threads
The eyes I found will turn ideals into reality
The world is, that's right, for your sake, from the start
With the memories held in my chest, and the resolve that continues from that day
I can fly, Redo
Even if you forget about me
I won't forget anymore, I won't hurt anyone
Time to save the vanishing past
Start from here
The fleeting moment, to a wish that can only be made once
I was certainly entrusted with it
One day's promise will become a light's guide
This oath, for your sake, until the very end
Even tears will surely turn into strength
I will connect to the future I was drawing
I'll connect it

The performers sing 'Happy Birthday to You' to celebrate. Flames are visible on stage.
